name: Critical AD Group Membership Change
description: Alerts on changes to critical Active Directory security groups such as Domain Admins, Enterprise Admins, and Schema Admins. Requires approval from the security team before the change is allowed to persist. If denied, the membership change is automatically reverted, and a full audit trail is created for compliance.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Revert group membership changes if not approved

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create audit trail ticket for group membership changes

data.title: Group Membership Change Alert
data.summary: Fires when a critical AD security group membership is modified

data.title: AI Group Change Analysis
data.summary: Analyze the group membership change for risk and authorization context

data.title: Security Team Approval
data.summary: Require security team approval for the critical group membership change

config.message: Critical AD group change detected. User {{$.trigger.alert.target_user_email}} was added to {{$.trigger.alert.group_name}} by {{$.trigger.alert.changed_by}}. Approve to keep, deny to revert. Auto-denied on timeout.

data.title: Change Approved?
data.summary: Branch based on security team approval decision

data.title: Create Approval Audit Ticket
data.summary: Create audit ticket documenting the approved group change

config.title: Approved: {{$.trigger.alert.target_user_email}} added to {{$.trigger.alert.group_name}}
config.description: Critical group membership change approved. User {{$.trigger.alert.target_user_email}} added to {{$.trigger.alert.group_name}} by {{$.trigger.alert.changed_by}}. Approved by: {{$.nodes.gm-3.result.approved_by}}.

data.title: Revert Group Change
data.summary: Remove the user from the critical group to revert the unauthorized change

params.reason: Critical group membership change not approved — reverted

data.title: Notify Changed-By User
data.summary: Notify the person who made the change that it was reverted

config.message: Your change to add {{$.trigger.alert.target_user_email}} to {{$.trigger.alert.group_name}} was not approved and has been reverted. Please submit a formal change request through the appropriate approval channel.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: Critical AD group membership change response finished

config.summary: Critical AD group membership change alert and approval process completed
